overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage depicting a nighttime campfire gathering on the outskirts of a futuristic city, with illuminated twin towers visible in the background. The scene features warm firelight contrasting against cool blue atmospheric night lighting as characters socialize in a relaxed, post-apocalyptic urban setting.

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic shot of a campfire gathering at night on the outskirts of a futuristic city. Several people are gathered around the central fire, with some standing and others sitting, while the illuminated twin towers of the city skyline rise prominently in the background. The warm firelight contrasts with the cool blue night atmosphere, and artistic structures including a palm tree and windmill sculpture frame the scene on either side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static cinematic view of a nighttime gathering that emphasizes the contrast between a cozy campfire and a distant, futuristic cityscape. It begins by focusing on a group of people gathered around a central fire, where the warm orange glow illuminates those sitting and standing in the immediate circle. As the eye moves outward, the cool blue atmosphere of the night takes over, framing the gathering with artistic structures like a palm tree and a windmill sculpture. The scene then expands toward the horizon, where the illuminated twin towers of the city skyline rise prominently against the dark sky.
